pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project will not compile or run on JDK 11 if the source/target compatibility remains set to 1.8, potentially causing class version mismatches or missing language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jakarta.annotation-api dependency to replace javax.annotation removed in JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation package was removed from the JDK in version 11; code using @Generated or other annotations from this package will fail to compile without an explicit dependency.
